companies.name: Fal.ai
companies.reason: Fal.ai has raised approximately $250 million in a funding round with a valuation surpassing $4 billion, backed by major investors Kleiner Perkins and Sequoia Capital. This funding aims to enhance their multimodal AI infrastructure, addressing the increasing demand for advanced multimedia tools.

companies.name: Accelsius
companies.reason: Accelsius has secured $65 million in Series B funding led by Johnson Controls, with participation from Legrand. The investment supports the development of advanced liquid cooling technologies for data centers, particularly for AI applications and gigawatt-class facilities.
